hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Velvet Pinnacle Hall, Shelkopolis, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of illusionist visibly slip.
